name: Append to Lattice Vector
description: Appends an element to a vector at a writable lattice path: w/, o/, n/ (agent scope), or t/ (job temp). Creates a new single-element vector if the path does not exist. Intermediate maps are created on demand for deeper paths. Errors if the target contains a non-vector value — use covia_write for non-vector targets. Returns {appended: true}.

path.description: Writable path to a vector (creates one if missing). Must start with w/, o/, n/, or t/. Deep paths create intermediate maps.

value.description: The element to append. You should normally use structured values rather than serialised strings.

appended.description: True if the element was appended successfully
